data.settleTest: CBRE's 2025-26 pipeline dataset (or IndexBox EU rack-PDU country tables) showing the geographic split of new/refresh MW by country — this exists today and would settle whether CE-7's 39.8% standing-capacity share matches where 2026 PDU orders get written.

proposedCorrection.rationale: PDU revenue tracks new-build/refresh flow, not standing capacity; with 57-70% of new supply landing in FLAPD (mostly outside CE-7), the flow-weighted CE share is materially below the 39.8% standing-share, so the base and band should shift down.

researchQueries.query: CBRE 2025-2026 European data centre pipeline MW by country/market — share delivered in CE-7 markets (Warsaw, Vienna, Zurich, Berlin, Prague, etc.) vs FLAPD
IndexBox EU Rack PDUs country tables — CE-7 country revenue shares vs FLAPD countries to test whether PDU spend tracks standing MW rather than new-build flow
